goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the 'north'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'whether they have free parking'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'nightclub' and should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of park'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'phone number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '02:30'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the north
The hotel doesn't need to include internet and should be in the moderate price range
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get postcode and whether they have free parking
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of nightclub and should be in the same area as the hotel
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of park
Make sure you get entrance fee and phone number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 02:30
Make sure you get contact number and car type
